summary: Tested Admin → Places (TDC Verified Registry) feature end-to-end. Backend: all 4 admin endpoints return HTTP 200 with correct shape (GET /verified, POST /verify create+toggle-off, DELETE /verify/{id}, GET /top-unverified, POST /send-outreach-digest). Frontend: PlacesVerifiedManager mounts with all required data-testid elements, E2E flow (add → appears in list → remove → disappears) works, outreach digest sends successfully with confirmation 'Digest sent — 0 unverified places sent to dipali@clubconcierge.in'. Regression on Dashboard/Orders tabs passed.

issues: 'Places' tab is only accessible via collapsed Quick Nav sidebar (paw-print toggle). Not exposed in main 12 PILLARS / Command Center horizontal tab groups. A user might not discover the Places tab without opening the hidden sidebar. Consider adding the Places tab to the visible 12 PILLARS section in Admin.jsx ~line 2478 so it's discoverable without sidebar toggle.

action_items: OPTIONAL DISCOVERABILITY: Expose 'Places' tab in the main visible Admin tab groups (currently only appears inside the collapsed Quick Nav sidebar at Admin.jsx line 2605). Add to 12 PILLARS or Commerce section for parity.
critical_code_review_comments: admin_places_verified_routes.py has no real auth — require_admin() returns True unconditionally. Admin endpoints are wide-open behind the ingress; relies on gateway-level basic-auth only. Not a bug per the comment but worth documenting.

places_outreach_digest._compute_digest() invokes the route handler with _admin=True, which bypasses FastAPI's Depends — works, but tightly couples digest module to the route internal signature. Extract a shared helper for cleaner separation.
Admin.jsx is 7240 lines — far exceeds the 700 line rule. Should be split into per-tab components; the new PlacesVerifiedManager.jsx is already a good example of this pattern.
test_credentials: Admin: aditya / lola4304 at /admin. Member: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123.
seed_data_creation: Test flow created 'Doggy Paradise Vet Clinic' (Bangalore, care) then removed it — cleanup verified. Final verified total = 2 (wag&wine - pet cafe, Cessna Lifeline Veterinary Hospital) matches handover spec.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Places tab lives inside collapsed Quick Nav sidebar (Admin.jsx line 2605). To trigger via Playwright, use JS click: `btns.find(b => b.textContent.trim() === 'Places').click()` since the sidebar element has offsetParent=null when collapsed. React onClick still fires. Integration to /care Find Care NearMe badge ordering was not retested — skipped per review request since Google Places live results don't populate in preview env.
rca of the issue: No bugs found — all functionality works as specified. Only a discoverability observation: the new 'Places' tab is defined inside the hidden sidebar; users must click the paw-print toggle at top-left of admin to expose it.
